prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约11894、12544、11725、11395、11838名，整体在11395–12544区间波动，近5年无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约11838名；该校在湖北物理类招生计划从2021年65人逐步扩至2025年96人，2026年进一步扩至117人，较2025年扩招约21.9%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。 华东理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第45名稳步上升至2026年第42名，近年排名持续提升，反映综合实力增强。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2022年曾发生食堂偷窃事件，声誉偏负面，但近年无新增重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第34（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，报考关注度有所升温；未见投档线异常 /断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学A-、控制科学与工程A-，共3个A-及以上学科，化工领域实力突出，与招生专业中的 化工与制药类、化学类、材料类等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，华东理工大学在这些方向均有招生；但化 工、材料、生物等传统优势专业属于"生化环材"大类，社会热度明显劝退；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，物理类估算约25.28万人，较2025年略增约3000人，竞争略有 加剧；华东理工大学位于上海市，对湖北考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在湖北招生计划持续扩大，显示对湖北生源的重 视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11838名、2026年大幅扩招约21.9%（使位次后移）、软科排名稳步上升（增强吸引力）、抖音热度较热（关注度升温）、湖北物理类考 生略增（竞争略加剧）等多重因素；考虑学校排名上升和热度升温对竞争的推升作用，预测2026年物理类最低位次约1 3342名，区间12842–13842名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 11894, 12544, 11725, 11395, and 11838, fluctuating within the range of 11395–12544, with no clear unilateral trend in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 11838; the enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Physics Category gradually expanded from 65 students in 2021 to 96 in 2025, and further expanded to 117 in 2026, an increase of about 21.9% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition. East China University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking steadily rose from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2022, there was a cafeteria theft incident, which had a negative impact on reputation, but no major negative public opinion has emerged in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, and application attention has increased; no abnormal or gap records in admission cutoffs have been observed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, with a total of 3 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting outstanding strength in the chemical engineering field, which is highly related to the enrollment majors such as Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Chemistry, and Materials.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and East China University of Science and Technology offers enrollment in these directions; however, traditional advantageous majors like Chemical Engineering, Materials, and Biology belong to the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, which has significantly low social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Gaokao is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 252,800 in the Physics Category, an increase of about 3,000 compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Hubei candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei continues to expand, indicating its emphasis on Hubei students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11838, a significant enrollment expansion of about 21.9% in 2026 (which will push the ranking backward), the steady rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), relatively high Douyin popularity (increasing attention), and a slight increase in Hubei Physics Category candidates (slightly intensifying competition); taking into account the upward pressure on competition from the university's rising ranking and increased popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 13342, with a range of 12842–13842.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 13342, with a range of 12842–13842. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (12842) or above can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science Category and Electronic Information Category; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 13300) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Mathematics Category, Physics Category, and Double Bachelor's Degree Programs, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (13842) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering/Energy and Environment) and Management Science and Engineering Category as safety options, while also trying for some Tier 2 majors. East China University of Science and Technology has outstanding A+ discipline in Chemical Engineering, and candidates interested in chemical engineering can enter the flagship major platform with lower rankings in Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2240, 3110, 3225, 3884, and 3621, showing an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative backward shift was about 1644 places, with a slight recovery to 3621 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3621. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei has been 4 students from 2021 to 2026, with a long-term stable number and no expansion or contraction, indicating a basically stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years and enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2022, there was a cafeteria theft incident, which had a negative impact on reputation, but no major negative public opinion has occurred in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 34th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. No abnormal or interrupted admission records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received A+, Chemistry A-, and Control Science and Engineering A-, all in science and engineering fields. The History Category enrollment majors (Foreign Language and Literature, Landscape Architecture) have a low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign Language and Literature majors have generally lukewarm social popularity, with admission rankings for small language majors generally declining in recent years. The Landscape Architecture major has no separate discipline evaluation rating, and its social popularity is divided and uncertain. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Gaokao is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 140,900 in the History Category, basically the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3621, the long-term stable enrollment plan, the steadily rising university ranking (enhancing overall attractiveness), the basically stable scale of History Category candidates, and the generally lukewarm popularity of foreign language majors, considering that foreign language majors are relatively cold in social popularity and Landscape Architecture is not a core strength of the university, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3651, with a range of 3151 to 4151.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 3651, with a range of 3151 to 4151. There are only 2 enrollment majors in History Category. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (3151) can aim for Foreign Language and Literature; those with rankings near the upper limit (4151) are advised to use Landscape Architecture as a safety option. East China University of Science and Technology excels in science and engineering, but the History Category enrollment majors are few and have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines. Candidates should consider personal interests and employment expectations when applying.
